title: Traveler's Delight
description: A diverse modpack that aims to make minecraft more interesting to explore.
body:
# A diverse modpack that aims to make minecraft more interesting to explore.
Ever wished minecraft was more interesting to explore? Are you the type of person whose base is a bed with a crafting table and furnace with chests? Want more dificulty and challenge in your minecraft world? Or maybe you just want something to spruce up minecraft? Well this is the modpack for you!

**!! WARNING**
You MUST allocate more than 2GB of memory to the modpack. I reccomend atleast <3200MB of Memory for this modpack. You can find this under Settings > Java and Memory
## Added Features
- Overhauled ender eye system. Ender eyes must now be found in certain structures (see End Remastered mod for more details)
- Tons of new structures and revamped structures
- New skill system which restricts access to certain features. You earn Skill points via XP and Menu can be accessed by pressing "K"
- Water bar, which can be filled with Flasks which can be created using 5 Leather and be upgraded
- Temperature system
- Minimap and Worldmap, aswell as Waystones
- Backpacks for more storage
- Villagers now take coins instead of emeralds
- New biomes in all dimensions
- Seasons system
- Revamped fishing system
- Horses have been buffed and are now a viable source of travel
- New armor types
- On death, you can now spawn around the area you died

## General tips
- You can smelt rotten flesh into leather (just make sure to switch it from charcoal)
- Taking off armor or putting on more will change your temperature
- Killing mobs is the most effecient source of skill XP, However mining and trading can be viable aswell
- You can use the Emi Search bar to research about custom modded items
- If you are having FPS issues, I reccomend disabling cosmetic mods, especially Distant Horizons, Biome Fog, Sounds, Sound physics Remastered, particle rain, and particular
- If you plan to host this on a server, you might want to get rid of the "Optimizer" mod
